name: edge-agents
description: Repo-local Codex plugin for Edge proposal, validation, promotion, export, deploy, maintenance, ChatGPT-app, and thesis-bootstrap workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Bounded operator, review, export, maintenance, and advanced thesis-bootstrap workflows for Edge.
interface.longDescription: Project-local Codex plugin for Edge. It wraps the repo's canonical make, edge operator, validate report, export, deploy, and edge-chatgpt-app surfaces with reusable Codex skills, maintenance routing, proposal inspection helpers, run-review helpers, developer wrappers, and guardrail hooks for bounded research, explicit thesis-batch export, diagnosis, app upkeep, and advanced packaging maintenance.
defaultPrompt: Explain and plan a bounded proposal using the Edge operator workflow.
Run the smallest correct repo validation loop after plugin, docs, or contract-sensitive changes.
Export one explicit thesis batch from a run and inspect its deployment state.
Route a repo change through the right validation and generated-doc maintenance loop.
Inspect or develop the Edge ChatGPT app surface without bypassing canonical operator flows.
Diagnose an Edge run and decide keep, modify, or kill.
Use the advanced thesis bootstrap lane only when broader packaging maintenance is required.
